steps.name: demo-asset-inventory-and-storyboard
steps.summary: E2E1 added scripts/e2e_demo_asset_inventory.py, tests/test_e2e_demo_asset_inventory.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-e2e1-demo-asset-inventory.md. The demo story now orders parser, controlled source lane, workflow, retriever, and operator evidence into one public-safe storyboard.

steps.name: scenario-contract
steps.summary: E2E2 added scripts/e2e_scenario_contract.py, tests/test_e2e_scenario_contract.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-e2e2-scenario-contract.md. The scenario now has stage-level input, evidence, output, review checkpoint, operator command, and failure boundary contracts for parser, source lane, workflow, retriever, and operator stages.

steps.name: demo-packet-builder
steps.summary: E2E3 added scripts/e2e_demo_packet_builder.py, tests/test_e2e_demo_packet_builder.py, docs/reports/2026-07-05-e2e3-demo-packet-builder.md, and docs/reports/end-to-end-demo/INDEX.md. The packet gives one ordered public-safe navigation surface with reports, commands, purposes, and recovery hints.

steps.name: demo-smoke-and-navigation-gate
steps.summary: E2E4 added scripts/e2e_demo_smoke_gate.py, tests/test_e2e_demo_smoke_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-e2e4-demo-smoke-gate.md. The smoke gate verifies packet existence, report links, local script commands, recovery hints, public-safe packet surface, and a synthetic missing-report failure path.

steps.name: horizon-close-gate
steps.summary: E2E5 added scripts/e2e_demo_close_gate.py, tests/test_e2e_demo_close_gate.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-end-to-end-demo-scenario-close-report.md. The horizon closes as demo_ready with docs/reports/end-to-end-demo/INDEX.md as the packet and objective-gap-audit-or-demo-rehearsal as the next candidate.
